title: Prayer of the petition; ex parte order of taking
doc_html:
§144.  Prayer of the petition; ex parte order of taking

The petition shall conclude with a prayer that the property and/or servitude be declared taken for public purposes and, upon presentation of the petition, the court shall issue an order directing that the amount of the estimate be deposited in the registry of the court and declaring that the property described in the petition has been taken for public purposes at the time of the deposit.  

Added by Acts 1958, No. 204, §1.
doc_text:
§144.  Prayer of the petition; ex parte order of taking
The petition shall conclude with a prayer that the property and/or servitude be declared taken for public purposes and, upon presentation of the petition, the court shall issue an order directing that the amount of the estimate be deposited in the registry of the court and declaring that the property described in the petition has been taken for public purposes at the time of the deposit.
Added by Acts 1958, No. 204, §1.
